_comment: COPY FIXES. Copy this to ops/approvals/approved-copy-fixes.json and set approved:true only for exact text swaps Luke has approved. `find` must be a UNIQUE string in the file. Allowed files: *.html, assets/*.css, assets/*.js (never api/, sw.js, config, or secrets). Applier is dry-run unless --apply; backs up each file. Never invents copy; refuses disallowed wording (e.g. 'live price').
find: OLD exact text that appears once
